title: Enterprise-managed auth for MCP connectors
summary: Anthropic has launched enterprise-managed authentication for MCP connectors, allowing administrators to authorize and authenticate connectors organization-wide through identity providers without individual setup. This streamlines enterprise deployment by centralizing authentication at the admin level.
writeup: This video covers Anthropic's launch of enterprise-managed authentication for MCP connectors, which lets administrators authorize and authenticate connectors across an organization through identity providers. It matters because it removes per-employee setup and standardizes how Model Context Protocol connectors are deployed at scale. The key takeaway: connector authorization and authentication move to a central, identity-provider-driven control point rather than individual configuration.
